main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'CaCO3 etapa 2 + fallo combinado dosificación y control pH' — match exacto.

recommended_action.justification: Parada emergencia + CIP cítrico 2% pH 3.5-4.0 30-35°C 4-6h — match exacto gold ACT 1.

requested_data.justification: Pide LSI rechazo etapa 2 — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Single threshold: si autopsia muestra mayoritario no-CaCO3 → switch.
